business.name: Malone's Roofing & Gutters
business.tagline: Keeping Middle Georgia dry since day one

hero.headline: *Every roof* tells a story — we fix the leaky chapters
hero.subheadline: When your shingles give up, we show up. Same-day estimates, honest answers, and work that lasts.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Roofs and gutters — that's what we do
services_section.subheading: No windows, no siding, no distractions. Just expert roofing work and gutter solutions.

services.title: Roof Repair & Replacement
services.description: From missing shingles to full tear-offs, we handle every type of roof problem. Metal, asphalt, tile — we know them all.

services.title: Gutter Installation & Repair
services.description: New gutters, repairs, and cleaning services. Keep water flowing away from your foundation where it belongs.

services.title: Storm Damage Assessment
services.description: After the storm passes, we'll inspect your roof and gutters for damage. Insurance claims assistance available.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Regular inspections catch small problems before they become expensive ones. Keep your roof in top condition.

about.heading: Malone's means reliable roofing in Macon
about.body: We're the local roofing company that Middle Georgia homeowners trust when their roof needs attention. From storm damage to aging shingles, we provide honest assessments and quality work. Every job gets our full attention — whether it's a simple repair or a complete roof replacement.

reviews.name: Ruth D.
reviews.text: Incredibly thorough work and completely reliable service. They did exactly what they promised.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Professional roofing services throughout the region

cta.heading: Your roof won't fix itself
cta.body: Stop putting off that repair. Get a free estimate today and find out exactly what needs to be done — no surprises, no pressure.
